note: Temporary example content used to test the richer deliverable schema: case for change, ownership, benefits, outputs, measures, definition of done, resources, decisions, assumptions and risks. Move into the main plan data once the format is agreed.

caseForChange.problem: Students are often presented with opportunities as a menu, rather than supported to understand what they want from King's and how to shape their experience over time.
caseForChange.opportunity: King's Canvas can create a recurring purpose conversation that helps students connect aspiration, skills, experience and opportunity across their journey.
caseForChange.whyNow: AI, student expectations and a more contested graduate premium make it more important that students can explain what they are building through their King's education.
caseForChange.intendedChange: King's creates tools, prompts and a student journey model for a recurring purpose conversation from pre-entry to graduation.

benefits.title: Students can shape and articulate a purposeful King's journey
benefits.statement: Students have a clearer way to connect purpose, skills, experience and opportunity across their time at King's.
benefits.currentState: Purpose, opportunity planning and skills articulation are supported unevenly across the student journey.
benefits.desiredChange: Students repeatedly revisit purpose and opportunity choices through a supported, visible and evidenceable journey model.

benefits.title: King's has a clearer service model for purpose and opportunity navigation
benefits.beneficiary: Programmes, advisers, Careers, KCLSU and student-facing teams
benefits.statement: Colleagues have a shared model for when and how students are prompted, supported and signposted.
benefits.currentState: Support is distributed across many teams and moments, but not yet configured as a coherent journey.
benefits.desiredChange: Canvas gives teams a common rhythm, language and support model for student purpose conversations.

outputs.title: King's Canvas service blueprint
outputs.description: A clear account of the student journey, moments of use, human support model, data requirements and digital touchpoints for Canvas.
acceptanceCriteria: Defines lifecycle moments from pre-entry to graduation
Identifies human support roles as well as digital touchpoints
Sets out data, privacy and AI assumptions for validation

outputs.title: Pilot-ready purpose conversation prompt set
outputs.description: A structured prompt set that can be tested with students across key lifecycle moments.
acceptanceCriteria: Includes prompts for purpose, skills, experience and opportunity planning
Tested with students for language, usefulness and trust
Can be used by human supporters as well as a digital tool

outputs.title: Digital requirements brief for the Single Student App roadmap
outputs.description: A concise product-facing brief that translates the Canvas concept into technical and data requirements.
acceptanceCriteria: Requirements are expressed in product and data language
Integration points with the Single Student App are identified
Build route, ownership and sequencing assumptions are recorded

outputs.title: Canvas pilot evaluation report
outputs.description: Captures reach, usefulness, operational burden, data issues and student-facing value from pilot use.
acceptanceCriteria: Tests usefulness rather than only usage
Identifies what must change before wider adoption

outputs.title: Embedded Canvas operating model
outputs.description: Sets out how Canvas is sustained across curriculum, co-curriculum, advising, Careers and opportunity navigation.
acceptanceCriteria: Support roles, maintenance rhythm and governance route agreed
Resource and benefits case prepared for wider adoption

measures.title: Student engagement with purpose conversation
measures.questionAnswered: Are students actually engaging with the purpose conversation at meaningful points in their journey?
measures.baseline: No universal Canvas model in place
measures.measure: Proportion of participating students completing at least one Canvas reflection cycle.

measures.title: Usefulness to students
measures.questionAnswered: Do students find Canvas useful for making sense of purpose, skills, opportunities and next steps?
measures.measure: Student-reported usefulness of Canvas prompts, planning outputs and opportunity recommendations.

measures.title: Integration into digital roadmap
measures.questionAnswered: Has Canvas moved from concept into the digital and service roadmap?
measures.target: Requirements accepted into Single Student App planning
measures.measure: Evidence that Canvas requirements are included in product roadmap and technical planning.
measures.owner: Single Student App sponsor / Zak Evans

measures.title: Support model readiness
measures.questionAnswered: Is there a named human support model around Canvas, rather than just a digital tool?
measures.target: Named support roles and handoff points agreed before scale
measures.measure: Evidence of agreed roles, referral routes and operating rhythm.

definitionOfDone: Canvas service blueprint, prompt set and digital requirements are accepted by the accountable owner.
Pilot evidence has tested student usefulness, operating burden and integration with the wider student journey.
Benefit owner, long-term product/service owner and decision forum are confirmed before wider adoption.
Measures are baselined or explicitly marked as requiring pilot discovery.
Dependencies with the Single Student App and student journey governance are resolved or actively managed.

assumptions.title: Canvas should be part of a wider student journey model, not a standalone optional tool
assumptions.validationNeeded: Test through service blueprinting and student co-design.

assumptions.title: AI adds value only when it supports reflection, planning and navigation in a trusted way
assumptions.validationNeeded: Test student trust, privacy expectations and usefulness during discovery.

decisions.title: Confirm whether Canvas is framed as a universal entitlement or targeted pilot first
decisions.recommendation: Start with pilot lifecycle moments, but design the model so it can become a universal entitlement.

decisions.title: Confirm digital build route
decisions.decisionMaker: Single Student App sponsor / Zak Evans
decisions.recommendation: Align Canvas requirements with the Single Student App wherever possible.

risks.title: Canvas becomes another optional tool rather than part of the student journey
risks.mitigation: Design the lifecycle rhythm and human support model before specifying functionality.

risks.title: AI enrichment is over-specified before the student value proposition is clear
risks.mitigation: Start from the purpose conversation and student journey, then decide where AI genuinely adds value.

outputs.title: Purpose conversation definition
outputs.description: Defines what the conversation should cover and how it supports aspiration, skills, reflection and opportunity planning.

outputs.title: Lifecycle rhythm map
outputs.description: Shows where Canvas should appear from pre-entry to graduation and how often students revisit it.

people.notes: Short focused input to frame the lifecycle model and translate it into a usable journey.

nonCashNeeds.item: Access to existing student journey work
nonCashNeeds.notes: Needed to avoid designing Canvas as a standalone intervention.

resources.resourceSummary: Mainly internal design and student journey capacity at this stage.

decisions.title: Confirm whether Canvas is framed as a universal entitlement or targeted pilot first
decisions.notes: This affects the scale of design, communications and digital requirements.

risks.title: Canvas becomes another optional tool rather than part of the student journey
risks.mitigation: Design the lifecycle rhythm and human support model before specifying functionality.

outputs.title: Canvas service blueprint
outputs.description: Specifies the student experience, prompts, digital functions, data model and support roles.

outputs.title: Student co-design synthesis
outputs.description: Summarises student feedback on language, usefulness, trust, privacy and likely moments of use.

outputs.title: Digital requirements brief
outputs.description: Translates Canvas into product requirements for the Single Student App team.

people.notes: Needed to turn the purpose conversation into a usable product and service model.
Needed to test what can responsibly be AI-enriched and what must remain human-supported.

cashCosts.notes: Workshops, incentives and synthesis to test language, prompts and trust assumptions.

nonCashNeeds.notes: Needed to align Canvas requirements with the broader app build.

resources.resourceSummary: Requires modest design capacity and an illustrative cash allocation for student co-design.

decisions.title: Confirm digital build route
decisions.owner: Single Student App sponsor / Zak Evans
decisions.notes: Needed before the Canvas concept becomes a separate tool or diverges from the app roadmap.

risks.title: AI enrichment is over-specified before the student value proposition is clear
risks.mitigation: Start from the purpose conversation and student journey, then decide where AI genuinely adds value.

outputs.title: Canvas pilot evaluation report
outputs.description: Captures reach, usefulness, operational burden, data issues and student-facing value from pilot use.

outputs.title: Revised Canvas implementation model
outputs.description: Adjusts the service model, prompts and support requirements based on pilot findings.

people.notes: Needed to coordinate departments, student communications and evaluation.

cashCosts.notes: Evaluation support, student incentives and synthesis of findings.

resources.resourceSummary: Requires pilot coordination and evaluation capacity.

risks.title: Pilots test functionality but not the broader student support model
risks.mitigation: Pilot Canvas in real lifecycle moments with named support routes.

outputs.title: Embedded Canvas operating model
outputs.description: Sets out how Canvas is sustained across curriculum, co-curriculum, advising, Careers and opportunity navigation.

outputs.title: Scale plan and benefits case
outputs.description: Summarises the resource, governance and value case for wider institutional adoption.

people.notes: Indicative capacity to maintain the model, prioritise improvements and support adoption.

nonCashNeeds.item: Governance route for recurring student journey touchpoints
nonCashNeeds.notes: Needed so Canvas becomes part of the rhythm of the student experience.

resources.resourceSummary: Requires a clear ownership and sustainment model before scale.

decisions.title: Agree long-term ownership for Canvas
decisions.notes: Without ownership, Canvas risks becoming a pilot artefact rather than institutional infrastructure.
